Title: Senior Data Analyst
Description:
Department

WDTech - R&D

We are Walker & Dunlop. We are one of the largest providers of capital to the commercial real estate industry, enabling real estate owners and operators to bring their visions of communities — where people live, work, shop, and play — to life. We are committed to creating meaningful social, environmental, and economic change in our communities.

Department Overview

WDTech is W&D’s in-house technology team – a group of collaborative and highly skilled technology professionals, all of whom are leading experts in real estate data, data science, and technology.

WDTech Engineering builds solutions that impact not only our products but also the people and processes across our organization. A commitment to innovation and a passion for disrupting the old-fashioned real estate industry are our highest priorities.

The Impact You Will Have

As a Senior Data Analyst, you will play a key role in delivering trusted data insights and analytics that support business and product decision-making across the organization. This role is responsible for analyzing complex datasets, developing reporting solutions and dashboards, and translating data into actionable insights that improve operational effectiveness and support strategic initiatives.

Working closely with Data Analysts, BI Analysts, Data Engineers, Data QA Engineers, Data Scientists, and Product Managers, you will help ensure data products are accurate, scalable, and aligned with evolving business needs as Walker & Dunlop continues to grow as a data-driven organization.

Primary Responsibilities


Analyze and curate data sources to support business and product stakeholders in making informed decisions.
Lead key components of the analytical lifecycle, including data exploration, analysis, reporting, and insight delivery.
Translate complex data into clear, actionable insights for technical and non-technical audiences.
Develop and maintain Power BI dashboards, reports, and analytical solutions.
Perform data wrangling, transformation, and analysis using SQL and enterprise analytical databases.
Define and document datasets, business logic, and reporting definitions to support consistent data usage.
Partner with data and product teams to support data governance, data quality, and data management processes.
Analyze user engagement, operational, and product data to identify trends and opportunities for improvement.
Mentor junior analysts and promote best practices in analytics, visualization, and stakeholder collaboration.
Perform other duties as assigned


Education And Experience


Bachelor’s degree preferred, preferably in Computer Science, Data Analytics, Information Systems, Mathematics, or a related field.
6+ years of experience in data analysis, business intelligence, or analytics roles with demonstrated ownership of end-to-end analytical projects.
Strong experience working with enterprise analytical databases such as Snowflake, Redshift, BigQuery, or similar technologies.
Experience developing dashboards and reporting solutions using Power BI, Tableau, or similar visualization tools.
Experience with SQL, data transformation, and analytical reporting workflows.
Experience with Python and geospatial analysis preferred.
Real estate, financial services, or related industry experience preferred.


Knowledge, Skills And Abilities


Deep expertise in SQL and data analysis techniques.
Strong proficiency with data visualization and reporting tools such as Power BI or Tableau.
Understanding of data modeling, ETL processes, and analytical best practices.
Ability to communicate technical concepts and analytical findings clearly to business and technical audiences.
Strong analytical, organizational, and problem-solving skills.
Ability to work collaboratively across technical and business teams in a fast-paced environment.
Familiarity with AI-enabled tools that support reporting, documentation, and analysis workflows preferred.
High level of accountability, attention to detail, and commitment to continuous improvement.
Ability to show ownership of your work, take on challenges and acknowledge growth opportunities, and demonstrate patience when learning new processes
Courtesy, respect, and thoughtfulness in teaming with colleagues and other stakeholders


What We Offer 


You will have the opportunity to accelerate in our rapidly growing organization.
Agile working environment with flexible working hours and location, career advancement, and competitive compensation package.
We are a family friendly company.
We arrange social activities to help our employees and families become familiar with each other and our culture.
In addition to other benefits, we offer a pension scheme and 100% complimentary and confidential mental health services.


EEO Statement

We are committed to equity in all steps of the recruitment and employment experience. We believe in equal access to opportunities in our workplace. We do not tolerate discrimination, including harassment, based on any characteristic protected by applicable law, such as race, color, national origin, religion, gender identity, sexual orientation, sex, age, disability, veteran or military status, and genetic information, or any other characteristic protected by applicable law. We strive to be a safe place to ask questions, build professional relationships, and develop careers.

SPAM

Please be wary of recruitment scams. An indication of a scam might be a request for sensitive or bank information at the time of application or emails coming from a non walkerdunlop.com email address. Please call us at 301.215.5500, if you have any concerns about information requested during or after the application process.

Title: Data Analist | Consultancy | Haarlem
Description:
Voor een consultancyorganisatie met een sterke focus op data en digitalisering zijn wij op zoek naar een Data Analist. In deze rol help je verschillende opdrachtgevers bij het omzetten van data naar waardevolle inzichten en stuurinformatie. Je werkt aan uiteenlopende vraagstukken binnen zowel commerciële als (semi)publieke organisaties.

Je bent verantwoordelijk voor het analyseren, structureren en visualiseren van data, waarbij je inzichten begrijpelijk maakt voor uiteenlopende stakeholders. Je schakelt veelvuldig met zowel business als IT en weet bruggen te slaan tussen techniek en besluitvorming.

Je komt terecht in een ambitieuze en informele werkomgeving waar samenwerking, kennisdeling en persoonlijke ontwikkeling centraal staan. Er is volop ruimte om initiatief te nemen en je verder te ontwikkelen binnen het data‑domein.

Jouw verantwoordelijkheden:

Analyseren en interpreteren van complexe datasets uit verschillende bronnen
Ontwikkelen van dashboards, rapportages en visualisaties
Vertalen van businessvraagstukken naar datagedreven inzichten
Adviseren van stakeholders over verbeteringen op basis van data
Verbeteren van datakwaliteit en optimaliseren van dataprocessen
Samenwerken met interne en externe stakeholders, waaronder IT-teams
Identificeren van kansen voor verdere datagedreven optimalisatie
Bijdragen aan de ontwikkeling van datamodellen en datastructuren

Jouw profiel:

Minimaal 2 jaar ervaring in een data- of analytics rol
Ervaring met SQL en datamanipulatie
Bekend met tools zoals Power BI, Tableau, Qlik of vergelijkbaar
Kennis van Python en/of R is een pré
Begrip van datamodellering, ETL-processen en datakwaliteit
Sterk analytisch vermogen en oog voor detail
Communicatief vaardig en in staat om complexe informatie helder over te brengen

Wat wij bieden:

Een salaris passend bij jouw ervaring
Maandelijkse bonus + jaarlijkse bonus
Auto van de zaak of mobiliteitsregeling
Flexibele werkvorm: thuis, bij de klant of op kantoor in Haarlem
Mogelijkheden voor certificeringen, opleidingen en doorgroeien
Maandelijkse activiteiten en een hecht teamgevoel

Interesse?

Wil je meer weten over deze rol of direct kennismaken? Neem contact op met Remy van Kesteren via +31 6 27 15 29 27 of stuur een e‑mail naar r.vankesteren@progressive-nl.com.


Let op: vacaturefraude




Helaas komt vacaturefraude steeds vaker voor. We waarschuwen je voor mogelijke misleiding:
* Wij zullen nooit via WhatsApp of in een videogesprek vragen om jouw persoonlijke gegevens (zoals een kopie van je ID, bankgegevens of BSN).
* Twijfel je over de echtheid van een vacature of contactpersoon? Neem dan altijd rechtstreeks contact met ons op via de officiële contactgegevens op onze website.

Important: job fraud

Unfortunately, job fraud is becoming more common. Beware of such scams:
* We will never ask for personal information (such as a copy of your ID, bank details, or social security number) via WhatsApp or during a video call.
* If you're unsure whether a vacancy or contact person is legitimate, please reach out to us directly using the official contact details on our website.

Title: Senior Data Analyst
Description:
Senior Data Analyst

Amsterdam, Netherlands

Up to 100k annually




This is an opportunity to take on a highly visible Senior Data Analyst role where your insights will directly influence product, commercial strategy, and customer experience at scale. You will work with complex datasets and senior stakeholders, shaping decisions that impact millions of users across a leading digital platform.




The Company

They are a well-established digital platform business operating at significant scale across the Benelux region. With millions of monthly users, they connect consumers and businesses through a marketplace model while supporting sustainable and circular commerce. Their teams are cross-functional, data-driven, and focused on continuous product and commercial innovation. Analytics plays a central role in enabling smarter decisions across the organisation.




The Role

Partner with product, marketing, and commercial teams to translate business challenges into actionable analytical plans
Identify growth opportunities and risks through deep analysis of user behaviour, conversion, and revenue trends
Design and build dashboards that clearly communicate performance and key business metrics
Analyse large, complex datasets to uncover meaningful insights and inform decision-making
Influence stakeholders across all levels through clear storytelling and data-driven recommendations
Support experimentation and measurement frameworks to evaluate product and marketing initiatives
Collaborate with data and engineering teams to improve data quality, tracking, and metric definitions




Your Skills and Experience

Strong commercial experience in data analytics within a digital, product-led, or marketplace environment
Advanced SQL skills and confidence working with large-scale datasets
Experience using Python for analytical work, modelling, and automation
Hands-on experience with cloud data platforms such as BigQuery, Databricks, or AWS
Proficiency with BI tools such as Tableau or similar for building impactful dashboards
Strong understanding of business metrics including conversion, retention, and customer lifetime value
Ability to translate ambiguous problems into clear analytical approaches
Confident communicator who can influence stakeholders and challenge thinking constructively




What They Offer

Competitive salary and benefits package
Opportunity to work on high-impact projects influencing product and commercial strategy
Collaborative, cross-functional working environment
Clear scope for career progression within a data-driven organisation
Exposure to large-scale data and modern data tooling




How to Apply

If you are interested in this Senior Data Analyst opportunity, please apply with your CV to be considered.

Title: BI Specialist / Data Analyst
Description:
Epassi’s purpose is to boost everyday well-being.

We are a leading provider of employee benefit solutions in Europe. We were established in Finland in 2007, and in 2008 we were the first company to launch a mobile-payable employee benefit payment solution in Europe. Since then, we have consistently grown, diversifying our products and introducing our services into new markets. Epassi has been awarded by the Financial Times as one of the fastest-growing companies in Europe on multiple occasions.

Epassi's purpose is to boost everyday wellbeing. We are a leading provider of employee benefit solutions across Europe, established in Finland in 2007. We were the first company in Europe to launch a mobile-payable employee benefit payment solution in 2008, and have consistently grown since — diversifying our products and entering new markets. Epassi has been recognised by the Financial Times as one of Europe's fastest-growing companies on multiple occasions.

We are currently hiring a BI Specialist / Data Analyst to be based in Amsterdam. In this role, you will translate complex data into actionable business insights that drive strategic decision-making across the organisation. You'll design, develop, and maintain reporting solutions and dashboards, working closely with stakeholders across departments to ensure data accuracy, accessibility, and relevance. You act as the bridge between data and actionable insights — based in Amsterdam in hybrid setup (3 days in office, 2 days remote).

Responsibilities


Design, develop and maintain BI dashboards, reports and data models in Power BI, connecting to data in Databricks.
Translate business requirements into analytical solutions and data products.
Ensure data integrity, consistency and governance across all reporting layers.
Act as a trusted data advisor to business stakeholders across departments.
Collect, clean and transform data from multiple sources using SQL and ETL tools.
Build and maintain automated reports and interactive dashboards for management and operational teams.
Conduct ad-hoc data analyses to support business questions and strategic initiatives.
Collaborate with IT and data engineering on data warehouse and pipeline improvements.
Document data definitions, logic and methodologies to support data literacy across the organisation.


Requirements


Minimum 3-5 years of hands-on experience in a BI or data analyst role, ideally within a SaaS/tech organisation.
Advanced Power BI skills, including DAX, data modelling and report design.
Strong hands-on expertise in SQL - several years of experience with the tool.
Experience with ETL/ELT pipelines and data warehousing concepts.
Demonstrated ability to turn raw data into business-ready insights and communicate findings to non-technical audiences.
Proven track record of building dashboards and data models used in production.
Experience working with cross-functional stakeholders and translating business needs into data requirements.
Bachelor's or Master's degree in Data Science, Business Intelligence, Information Management, Computer Science or a related field.
English — professional working proficiency (required). Dutch — advantageous but not mandatory.


Preferred


Microsoft Power BI certification (PL-300).
Experience working with Databricks as a data platform.


Your Track Record


You have owned analytics for a business area or market.
You have delivered insights that influenced real decisions.
You have built reporting trusted by senior stakeholders.
You have worked long enough in roles to develop and improve analytics, not just deliver quick outputs.


Key competencies


Analytical mindset: You approach problems with structure and attention to detail, turning ambiguous data challenges into clear, actionable conclusions.
Communication: You present complex data findings clearly to both technical and non-technical audiences, making insights accessible and actionable.
Proactivity: You are curious and self-driven — able to spot opportunities in data without being asked, and take initiative to turn them into insights.
Collaboration: You are a team player who builds trust across departments, working seamlessly with IT, finance, operations and beyond.
Data ownership: You take responsibility for data quality, governance and documentation, ensuring the business can rely on the information you provide.


Why join us


Be part of an ambitious growth journey and join a global community of driven, bold, entrepreneurial Epassians.
Work with a clear purpose — boosting everyday wellbeing — and create a meaningful, positive impact on individuals and society.
Thrive in an open and inclusive culture with low hierarchy, built on respect, camaraderie, and shared success.
Grow personally and professionally in a supportive environment where employee wellbeing is a true priority.
Join a fast-growing tech company with a strong financial foundation, with real opportunities to make an impact.
Help shape our position as the number one player in Europe's employee benefit market.

Since then, we have consistently grown, diversifying our products and introducing our services into new markets. Epassi has been awarded by the Financial Times as one of the fastest-growing companies in Europe on multiple occasions.

Epassi's purpose is to boost everyday wellbeing. We are a leading provider of employee benefit solutions across Europe, established in Finland in 2007. We were the first company in Europe to launch a mobile-payable employee benefit payment solution in 2008, and have consistently grown since — diversifying our products and entering new markets. Epassi has been recognised by the Financial Times as one of Europe's fastest-growing companies on multiple occasions.

We are currently hiring a BI Specialist / Data Analyst to be based in Amsterdam. In this role, you will translate complex data into actionable business insights that drive strategic decision-making across the organisation. You'll design, develop, and maintain reporting solutions and dashboards, working closely with stakeholders across departments to ensure data accuracy, accessibility, and relevance. You act as the bridge between data and actionable insights — based in Amsterdam in hybrid setup (3 days in office, 2 days remote).

Responsibilities

  • Design, develop and maintain BI dashboards, reports and data models in Power BI, connecting to data in Databricks.
  • Translate business requirements into analytical solutions and data products.
  • Ensure data integrity, consistency and governance across all reporting layers.
  • Act as a trusted data advisor to business stakeholders across departments.
  • Collect, clean and transform data from multiple sources using SQL and ETL tools.
  • Build and maintain automated reports and interactive dashboards for management and operational teams.
  • Conduct ad-hoc data analyses to support business questions and strategic initiatives.
  • Collaborate with IT and data engineering on data warehouse and pipeline improvements.
  • Document data definitions, logic and methodologies to support data literacy across the organisation.

Requirements

  • Minimum 3-5 years of hands-on experience in a BI or data analyst role, ideally within a SaaS/tech organisation.
  • Advanced Power BI skills, including DAX, data modelling and report design.
  • Strong hands-on expertise in SQL - several years of experience with the tool.
  • Experience with ETL/ELT pipelines and data warehousing concepts.
  • Demonstrated ability to turn raw data into business-ready insights and communicate findings to non-technical audiences.
  • Proven track record of building dashboards and data models used in production.
  • Experience working with cross-functional stakeholders and translating business needs into data requirements.
  • Bachelor's or Master's degree in Data Science, Business Intelligence, Information Management, Computer Science or a related field.
  • English — professional working proficiency (required). Dutch — advantageous but not mandatory.

Preferred

  • Microsoft Power BI certification (PL-300).
  • Experience working with Databricks as a data platform.

Your Track Record

  • You have owned analytics for a business area or market.
  • You have delivered insights that influenced real decisions.
  • You have built reporting trusted by senior stakeholders.
  • You have worked long enough in roles to develop and improve analytics, not just deliver quick outputs.

Key competencies

  • Analytical mindset: You approach problems with structure and attention to detail, turning ambiguous data challenges into clear, actionable conclusions.
  • Communication: You present complex data findings clearly to both technical and non-technical audiences, making insights accessible and actionable.
  • Proactivity: You are curious and self-driven — able to spot opportunities in data without being asked, and take initiative to turn them into insights.
  • Collaboration: You are a team player who builds trust across departments, working seamlessly with IT, finance, operations and beyond.
  • Data ownership: You take responsibility for data quality, governance and documentation, ensuring the business can rely on the information you provide.

Why join us

  • Be part of an ambitious growth journey and join a global community of driven, bold, entrepreneurial Epassians.
  • Work with a clear purpose — boosting everyday wellbeing — and create a meaningful, positive impact on individuals and society.
  • Thrive in an open and inclusive culture with low hierarchy, built on respect, camaraderie, and shared success.
  • Grow personally and professionally in a supportive environment where employee wellbeing is a true priority.
  • Join a fast-growing tech company with a strong financial foundation, with real opportunities to make an impact.
  • Help shape our position as the number one player in Europe's employee benefit market.

Title: Intern/Associate Consultant Data Science
Description:
In The Netherlands - Amsterdam

This opportunity offers a unique entry into Consulting as a Data Science Intern, particularly focusing on the use of Large Language Models (LLMs) and Natural Language Processing (NLP) in our UK and Netherlands projects.

What Makes Us Special


Become part of a unique entrepreneurial team. Think independently, use your initiative, and take some risks. Entrepreneurship is a powerful force that drives the growth not only of our firm but our clients and people.
Unlock the power of opportunity. Advance your career in a thriving company that creates positive impact. We invest in your professional development every step of the way.
Enjoy balance and flexible working. Be empowered to do your best work – whether it’s remotely or in the office.
Work in a values-driven culture. At Simon-Kucher, our vision is to become the world's leading growth specialist. Our values guide the way we do business and communicate our distinctiveness. They sum up what we stand for, influence our culture, and drive how and why we do things.


How You Will Create An Impact


You will be an integral part of project teams driving top-line growth for clients, mainly across UK and Netherlands projects.
Responsible for the core stages of model development, including:Data wrangling and pre-processingMachine learning model development, testing, and implementation.
You will analyze and communicate data insights to project teams to support strategic decision-making.
The internship offers an opportunity to learn about commercial strategy consulting in a practical, project-based environment.
Top-performing interns may be offered an entry-level Data Scientist position after completion of the internship.


Your Profile


You have completed both your VWO and bachelor's degree with above-average study results in a quantitative field, such as computer science, engineering, statistics, operational research, data science, or equivalent experience.
Deep knowledge of Machine Learning, statistical modelling, and NLP techniques.
Strong programming skills in R and/or Python, with experience in NLP libraries and frameworks.
Exceptional communication skills to effectively convey complex data insights.
High percentile numerical, deductive, and inductive reasoning skills.
A strong desire to work in a fast-paced, commercially agile environment.
A keen interest in commercial strategy and a desire to work in a dynamic, fast-paced environment.
Strong enthusiasm, curiosity, and a commitment to achieving the best outcomes.


Internships within the Data Science team usually last around 4 to 6 months and are designed to expose individuals to working on client projects. Interns can expect responsibility from the outset as a valued member of the project team. Throughout your time at Simon-Kucher, you will contribute to analysis and results and can benefit from working alongside experienced Consultants, Directors, and Partners. To be eligible for the internship, you must be enrolled at a university and able to work from our Amsterdam office during the internship period.

About Simon-Kucher

Simon-Kucher is a global consultancy with more than 2,200 employees in 30+ countries. Our sole focus is on unlocking better growth that drives measurable revenue and profit for our clients. As a trusted commercial advisor, we combine deep consulting expertise, growth specialization, and technology to scale impact. We optimize every lever of commercial strategy – product, pricing, innovation, marketing, sales, and digital – based on deep insights into what customers value and are willing to pay for. With over 40 years of experience in monetization, we are regarded as the world’s leading commercial growth and pricing specialist. simon-kucher.com

We believe in building a culture that embraces diversity, equity, and inclusion, creating an environment in which our people feel valued, are able to be themselves and feel their contribution matters. If we get that right, remarkable things will happen; people will grow faster, innovate, feel valued, and create better outcomes for everyone – our people, our clients and, of course, our business.

Your Personal Contact

Anne-Fleur Lefel

Recruitment.amsterdam@simon-kucher.com

Title: Revenue Management Analyst
Description:
Revenue Management Analyst

Start: ASAP

End: 31 December 2026 (extension possible)

Location: Veghel, Netherlands - Hybrid (2-3 days/week on site)

Hours: 36-40 hours per week

Sector: FMCG | Revenue Growth Management | Commercial Analytics

About the Role

A leading global FMCG company is looking for a Revenue Management Analyst to join its Benelux SRM team. Focusing on Promotion Effectiveness and Mix Management, you will help drive profitable growth by translating commercial data into actionable business insights.

Working closely with Sales, Finance, Portfolio and Category Management teams, you will evaluate promotional investments, analyse portfolio performance and identify opportunities to optimise commercial decision-making. This is an excellent opportunity for someone looking to build expertise in Revenue Growth Management and commercial strategy within a dynamic FMCG environment.




Key Responsibilities

Analyse promotional performance across customers, channels, brands and pack formats.
Evaluate promotion mechanics, discount depth, frequency, ROI, incremental volume and profitability.
Identify opportunities to improve promotional effectiveness and reduce inefficient trade spend.
Support the development of promotion guidelines and guardrails.
Analyse mix performance by brand, pack, channel and customer.
Identify opportunities to accelerate, defend, optimise or rationalise parts of the portfolio.
Build dashboards, reports and performance overviews for commercial teams.
Translate complex analyses into clear, actionable recommendations.
Support business reviews, annual planning cycles and internal SRM forums.
Collaborate with Sales, Finance, Portfolio and Category Management teams.

Profile

Bachelor's or Master's degree in Business, Economics, Finance, Marketing or related field.
3+ years' experience within FMCG, commercial analytics, category management, finance, consulting or sales.
Strong analytical skills and experience working with large datasets.
Good commercial understanding and interest in FMCG commercial strategy.
Advanced Excel and strong PowerPoint skills.
Ability to convert data into clear business recommendations.
Strong stakeholder management and communication skills.
Fluent English; Dutch is a plus.
Proactive, structured and detail-oriented.




Nice to Have

Experience with NielsenIQ, Power BI, VisualFabriq TPM or ThinkCell.
Background in Revenue Growth Management, Trade Marketing or Category Analytics.
Experience in an international FMCG organisation

Title: Data Analist / BI Specialist
HTML:
Als Data Analist / BI Specialist zorg jij ervoor dat organisaties hun data omzetten in waardevolle inzichten. Je analyseert complexe datasets, vertaalt deze naar heldere rapportages en dashboards en adviseert stakeholders over datagedreven beslissingen. Met moderne BI-tools zoals Power BI, Tableau of Qlik maak je informatie toegankelijk en begrijpelijk. Daarmee help je onze klanten – zoals de Belastingdienst, Gemeente Den Haag, Centraal Justitieel Incassobureau en VGZ – om hun beleid en processen te verbeteren en toekomstgericht te sturen.


Waarom past deze vacature bij jou?

Je hebt een passie voor data en ziet het als jouw missie om cijfers en informatie te vertalen naar verhalen die impact maken. Je bent analytisch sterk, communicatief vaardig en kunt schakelen tussen business en techniek. Je vindt het leuk om samen te werken met collega’s en stakeholders en voelt je thuis in een omgeving waar data centraal staat.


Wat kan je van ons verwachten?

Bij CIMSOLUTIONS krijg je de kans om te werken aan uitdagende en innovatieve data- en BI-projecten bij toonaangevende organisaties. Wij investeren in jouw ontwikkeling en bieden naast een inspirerende werkomgeving:

  • Een vast dienstverband voor onbepaalde tijd, een max. salaris van € 6.000, bonusregeling, leaseauto, pensioenregeling en maandelijkse onkostenvergoeding;
  • Opdrachtkeuzevrijheid: Jij bepaalt in overleg waar je aan werkt, met de begeleiding van een personal coach;
  • Per jaar € 5.000,- opleidingsbudget en daarnaast ook nog eens 5-10 dagen studietijd;
  • Kennissessies met vakgenoten en inhoudelijke events;
  • Minimaal 25 vakantiedagen, met de mogelijkheid om extra dagen op te bouwen of te verkopen;
  • Sociale events zoals sportdagen, weekend weg en gezellige borrels;
  • Een vestiging bij jou in de buurt.


Persoonlijke ontwikkeling

Bij CIMSOLUTIONS geloven we dat leren de sleutel is tot succes. Learn, create and make it work is niet alleen onze slogan, maar zit in ons DNA. Daarom investeren we continu in jouw groei. Je krijgt de ruimte om jezelf te ontwikkelen tot bijvoorbeeld Senior Data Analist, BI Architect of Data Platform Specialist. Je wordt begeleid door ervaren collega’s, krijgt toegang tot kennisplatforms en blijft altijd scherp op de nieuwste ontwikkelingen binnen jouw vakgebied.


CIMSOLUTIONS heeft een actief diversiteitsbeleid en streeft naar een evenwichtige verdeling van professionals naar onder andere leeftijd, gender, etnische achtergrond en cultuur, arbeidsvermogen, kennis en competenties. Daarbij benadrukken wij dat gelijke kansen voor iedereen een belangrijk uitgangspunt zijn in onze selectie.


Wat breng jij mee?

  • Een afgeronde hbo‑ of wo‑opleiding in Bedrijfskunde, Informatiekunde, Business Analytics of vergelijkbaar;
  • Minimaal 4 jaar aantoonbare ervaring in een Agile omgeving met het analyseren en interpreteren van data en het vertalen van inzichten naar concrete adviezen;
  • Vaardig in het ontwerpen van dashboards en visualisaties die inzichten helder presenteren met tools zoals PowerBi, Qlik of Tableau;
  • Sterke kennis van en ervaring met SQL en/of Databricks voor analyseren van grote datasets;
  • Kennis van actuele ontwikkelingen op het gebied van data-analyse, data-ethiek en relevante wet- en regelgeving;
  • Uitstekende communicatieve vaardigheden, zowel mondeling als schriftelijk;
  • AI-affiniteit is een pré.


Waarom CIMSOLUTIONS?

  • 15 keer Top Employer!
  • Uitstekend salaris;
  • Vrije keuze leaseauto;
  • € 5000,- opleidingsbudget;
  • Aantrekkelijke bonussen;
  • Veel sociale evenementen;
  • Uitdagende projecten;
  • Gevarieerde opdrachten;
  • Gerenommeerde klanten.


Heb je interesse?

Wij vinden het leuk om op ons hoofdkantoor of één van onze lokale vestigingen of online kennis te maken. Solliciteer via onderstaande button of neem voor meer informatie contact op met ons recruitment team via:

  • Mail: recruitment@cimsolutions.nl;
  • Telefoon: 0499-366 000;
  • of bezoek onze website: www.cimsolutions.nl/werken-bij/

Title: AI Analyst
HTML:
About us

At Main Capital Partners, we believe in the power of smart, driven individuals to shape the future of software. With over €6.5 billion in assets under management, we are a strategic investor focused on innovative software companies across Benelux, DACH, Nordics, France, and the US. Our mission is to support sustainable growth in the software sector, one of the most dynamic and impactful industries today.

We’re proud of our strong track record and our reputation as one of Europe’s most distinctive and high-performing investors. With a portfolio of 50+ companies and over 150 add-on acquisitions, we’re growing fast—and so is our team of 80+ professionals across offices in The Hague, Antwerp, Düsseldorf, Stockholm, Paris, and our affiliated office in Boston.

Due to the increase in the number of companies in our portfolio and the growing importance of AI within the software landscape, we are further expanding the Performance Excellence team. We are therefore looking for an AI Analyst.


Your opportunity: AI Analyst

As an AI Analyst, you will work closely with the Product, Tech & AI Lead within Performance Excellence and support both portfolio companies and deal teams in identifying, evaluating, and executing AI initiatives that create measurable business impact.

You will help portfolio companies translate AI opportunities into concrete initiatives, ensuring that these projects are designed, implemented, and monitored with clear KPIs and measurable outcomes. By tracking key AI metrics and performance indicators, you help ensure that AI initiatives contribute directly to operational improvements, growth, or efficiency gains.

In addition, you will support investment teams during the evaluation of new investment opportunities by assessing AI capabilities, risks, and opportunities within potential target companies. You will help build a clear view of how AI is currently used, the value it can create, and any potential risks or limitations that should be considered before investment decisions are made.

From an investment perspective, you contribute to value creation and risk management by translating AI insights into actionable recommendations for both deal teams and portfolio company leadership.


Tasks include:

  • Support AI value creation initiatives across the portfolio by identifying, evaluating, and monitoring AI use cases within portfolio companies;
  • Help portfolio companies design and implement AI initiatives with clear objectives, measurable KPIs, and defined success metrics;
  • Monitor and track AI performance metrics to ensure initiatives deliver tangible business impact;
  • Collaborate with deal teams to assess AI opportunities and risks in potential investment targets during due diligence;
  • Analyze the AI maturity and data readiness of prospective and existing portfolio companies;
  • Support portfolio companies in identifying practical AI use cases that improve operations, products, or customer experience;
  • Contribute to the development of AI best practices, playbooks, and frameworks that can be reused across the portfolio;
  • Help translate AI insights into concrete improvement roadmaps and value creation plans;
  • Stay up to date with developments in AI technologies, tooling, and governance, and share relevant insights with portfolio companies and internal teams.


Why you would be a good fit for us:

  • You have completed a university education (WO) in Artificial Intelligence, Data Science, Computer Science, (Technical) Business Analytics, or a similar field;
  • You enjoy working at the intersection of technology, data, AI, and business impact, translating AI opportunities into practical initiatives with measurable results;
  • You are comfortable operating on both a strategic and hands-on level: from identifying AI opportunities and defining KPIs to supporting implementation and monitoring impact;
  • You enjoy switching between AI strategy, data analytics, and investment perspectives, and you thrive in a dynamic environment where you can make a tangible impact;
  • You have 1–3 years of relevant experience, for example as an AI Analyst, Data Scientist, AI Consultant, Analytics Consultant, or in a similar role where you worked on AI or data-driven initiatives;
  • You have a solid understanding of AI and machine learning concepts, including model development, evaluation metrics, and how AI solutions create business value;
  • Experience with data analytics, experimentation, or monitoring performance metrics/KPIs for AI or data products is a strong plus;
  • You are comfortable analyzing AI capabilities, data maturity, and potential risks within organizations;
  • You have strong analytical and problem-solving skills and enjoy structuring complex technological topics into clear insights for business stakeholders;
  • You have strong social and communication skills and integrity, and you enjoy working closely with deal teams and management teams;
  • Excellent command of English and Dutch, both spoken and written, is required. German or French is a plus.


Why work with us:

  • Entrepreneurial, fun, young, and dedicated team within an informal and open corporate culture;
  • Gain experience, knowledge, and insight into a leading sector-focused investment fund in the fast-growing software sector;
  • Get involved in dynamic and interesting projects quickly;
  • Many responsibilities early on;
  • A steep learning curve and career progression;
  • Competitive benefits package, including (healthy) lunches every day and a generous Company Fitness plan.

Title: Marketing Data Analyst
Description:
Marketing Data Analyst – Marketing Mix & Audience Insights

Eindhoven, The Netherlands




I am currently seeking for a Marketing Data Analyst to join a dynamic team and drive impactful marketing decisions through analytics, audience insights, and data-driven strategy.




This is a role where you will have a big impact within a global organisation, you will be resposible for a number of different Marketing and innovative projects.




Dutch speaking is required for this role.




Key Responsibilities:

Develop and maintain Marketing Mix Models (MMM) to measure the effectiveness of campaigns and optimize media spend.
Support the design and execution of marketing strategies, using data to inform channel allocation, messaging, and creative decisions.
Conduct audience segmentation to identify high-value customer groups and uncover opportunities for growth.
Implement audience targeting strategies, ensuring campaigns reach the right people at the right time.
Analyze campaign performance and provide actionable insights to improve ROI and overall marketing effectiveness.
Collaborate closely with marketing, product, and analytics teams to deliver integrated, data-driven solutions.




Required Skills & Experience:

Proven experience in marketing analytics, preferably with exposure to Marketing Mix Modelling.
Strong knowledge of audience segmentation, targeting, and personalization techniques.
Proficiency in data analysis tools (e.g., SQL, Python, R, Excel, Tableau/Power BI).
Ability to translate complex data into clear, actionable insights for non-technical stakeholders.
Excellent communication and problem-solving skills.




What We Offer:

Opportunity to shape marketing strategy with data at the core.
Collaborative environment with cross-functional exposure.
Career development in a fast-growing, innovative company.
Competitive salary and benefits package.




If you’re ready to leverage data to drive smarter marketing decisions and deliver measurable impact, we want to hear from you!

Title: Junior Data Analist
HTML:
ErasmusTalent.nl is een online vacatureplatform voor Studenten, Trainees, Junior & Medior Professionals op HBO/WO-niveau met 0-10 jaar ervaring.


Voor onze Partner Veneficus zoeken wij een Junior Data Analist


Je bent (bijna) klaar met je studie en wat nu? Je vond puzzelen met data, het uitzoeken van problemen en het bedenken van de beste oplossingen altijd interessant, maar hoe ga je de functie vinden die het beste bij je past? VF Talent Academy biedt jou als jonge high potential een springplank voor de start van je carrière. Wij leiden jou op tot data-analist! Dit doen we door middel van een eenjarig traineeship, waarin de opleiding en ontwikkeling van jou als trainee centraal staat.


De eerste weken gebeurt dit bij ons intern, daarna ga je aan de slag bij een van onze opdrachtgevers. Direct het diepe in dus, zodat je on the job veel kan leren en de theorie direct in de praktijk kan brengen. Een springplank voor de start van je carrière!


Wat ga jij doen

  • Je maakt het verschil bij een van onze opdrachtgevers in de functie van Data-analist;
  • Je volgt inhoudelijke trainingen op het gebied van data gegeven door een technische trainer met ruime praktijkervaring;
  • Je neemt deel aan de soft skill trainingen om je sociale en communicatieve vaardigheden te ontwikkelen. Dit doen we bijvoorbeeld tijdens een weekend weg op een mooie locatie;
  • Je spreekt regelmatig met je Learning Consultant en Personal Coach in het kader van jouw leerplan;
  • Als jij en je opdrachtgever na de inzetperiode nog steeds enthousiast van elkaar worden, dan is er de mogelijkheid om in dienst te treden bij de opdrachtgever.


Wie zoeken wij

  • Een afgeronde Hbo- of Wo-opleiding (bij voorkeur een beta richting);
  • Enige ervaring met een moderne programmeertaal zoals Matlab, Python of R;
  • Sterke affiniteit met het datavakgebied;
  • Je bent leergierig en altijd bezig met je eigen ontwikkeling, zowel op professioneel als persoonlijk vlak;
  • Je bent niet bang om in het diepe te springen;
  • Flexibel inzetbaar en woonachtig in de Randstad of bereid om daar naartoe te verhuizen;
  • Je beheerst de Nederlandse taal uitstekend.


Wat bieden wij

  • Een traineeship met volop ruimte om je te ontwikkelen als Data Specialist;
  • Direct een vast contract met een basissalaris van € 2600 bruto per maand;
  • 25 vakantiedagen o.b.v. fulltime;
  • Een thuiswerk vergoeding van € 50 netto o.b.v. fulltime en 8% vakantiegeld;
  • Bonussen en salarisverhogingen die passen bij de snelle ontwikkeling die jij doormaakt;
  • Pensioen opbouw via STIPP en aanvullende verzekering bij langdurige ziekte;
  • Een NS-Businesscard en eventueel een Swapfiets;
  • Een laptop en alles voor een goede thuiswerkplek;
  • De mogelijkheid om te werken waar je wil (hybride) en zelfs in goed overleg remote;
  • Een vrijwilligersdag, een dag waarop je jouw steentje kan bijdragen aan onze maatschappij in een vorm die bij jou past!
  • Veel aandacht en ruimte voor jouw persoonlijke ontwikkeling door een ontwikkelpad waarbij zowel technische skills als soft skills centraal staan;
  • Regelmatige terugkom dagen, borrels en gezellige team uitjes!


Wie zijn wij

Veneficus. Optimizing Intelligence. Wij geloven in het optimaliseren van intelligentie. We ondersteunen beslissers om het verschil te maken door de kracht van data te benutten. Ons doel is om data en business samen te brengen met de perfecte mix van magie en logica.

We streven naar perfecte flows, grotere groei, slimmer werken en bovenal een gelukkiger leven. We willen jou helpen om jouw potentieel te benutten en een impact te maken op de wereld van data.


Interesse? Solliciteer direct via: Junior Data Analist


Op zoek naar meer uitdagende vacatures? Bekijk ze op www.erasmustalent.nl/vacatures !


Solliciteren via ErasmusTalent:

1️⃣ Vul je gegevens in en solliciteer via ons platform.

2️⃣ Het bedrijf laat je snel weten of je door bent.

3️⃣ Niet geselecteerd? Geen zorgen! We helpen je graag verder.

Title: Data Analyst – Data Quality & Migration
Description:
We are looking for a hands-on Data Analyst who knows how to turn messy source data into a solid foundation. Someone who digs into complex datasets, spots quality issues before they become problems, and prepares data that reporting, analytics, and self-service BI can actually rely on. You'll join a consultancy and play a key role in a large-scale data transformation programme for one of their clients.




This is not standard dashboard work. You'll be at the start of the data chain, where the real impact is made: profiling, cleansing, and structuring data before it ever reaches production.




What you'll be doing:

Profiling complex datasets for duplicates, anomalies, obsolescence, and business rule violations using Python or R
Managing and structuring source data in intermediate SQL databases
Building file structures aligned with mapping structures for ETL processes
Preparing cleansing proposals and delivering datasets ready for ETL ingestion
Supporting the reporting side with Power BI




What you bring:

Hands-on experience with SQL databases
Proficiency in Python and/or R for data profiling and analysis
Experience working in Azure environments
Working knowledge of Power BI and strong Excel skills
A solid understanding of data modelling principles and ETL processes




What you get:

Permanent contract, 32–40 hours per week
Hybrid working, based in the Netherlands
A generous annual learning budget for training and conferences
Premium hardware and a personal tech budget
Pension contribution
Immediate start possible

Title: Business Analyst (Data & AI)
Description:
ABOUT YOU

Are you passionate about bridging the gap between business and technology? We're looking for a Technical Business Analyst with a background in Data & AI who enjoys turning complex business needs into clear technical requirements. You'll thrive in a fast-paced environment where ownership, collaboration, and proactive problem-solving are key to delivering innovative AI-driven solutions.

WHAT ARE YOU GOING TO DO

Gather and analyse business requirements for Data & AI initiatives, translating them into clear technical specifications.
Collaborate with business stakeholders, technical teams, and external vendors to ensure successful solution delivery.
Test new platform features before release to ensure functionality, usability, and alignment with user needs.
Drive stakeholder alignment, provide delivery support, and create clarity across complex projects.
Work in a dynamic environment, proactively identifying opportunities and taking ownership to move initiatives forward.

AN IDEAL PROFILE WOULD BE

2-5 years of experience as a Business Analyst within a technical, data, or AI-focused environment.
Previous hands-on experience as a Data Scientist or Machine Learning Engineer with a solid understanding of data workflows, analytics, and machine learning concepts.
Strong analytical mindset with the ability to simplify and communicate complex technical topics to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.
Experience gathering requirements, supporting testing activities, managing stakeholders, and collaborating with external vendors.
Bachelor's or Master's degree in a relevant field (PhD is a strong advantage); consulting or start-up experience is highly desirable.

Tick all the boxes? Then smash that button and let's have a chat.

ABOUT US:

Levy is an international IT staffing organization providing recruitment and project resourcing services to companies ranging from start-ups to well established global players across the UK, Holland, Germany, Belgium, and the USA. By partnering with our clients, we provide tailored interim and permanent IT staffing solutions to help them deliver their initiatives across applications and infrastructure, touching areas such as Digital, Data, Cloud, Cybersecurity and ERP.

Description:
(Data) Analist – 5-8 Weekse Opdracht

Amsterdam, Nederland

Tot €5.000 per maand




Kick-start jouw analytics‑carrière met een korte maar impactvolle opdracht bij een toonaangevend internationaal marktonderzoeksbureau. Perfect voor studenten of pas afgestudeerden die graag met data werken, problemen oplossen en resultaatgericht zijn.

Je wordt onderdeel van een team dat grote hoeveelheden klantdata verwerkt — zie het als een intensieve kennismaking met echte data‑analytics, maar dan met ondersteuning, structuur en veel leermogelijkheden.




🔍 Wat Je Gaat Doen

Werken met klantdatasets en controleren of alles klopt
Uitvoeren van controles, berekeningen en kwaliteitschecks
Projectmanagers ondersteunen bij het opschonen en structureren van data
Voorbereiden van eenvoudige interne rapportages in PowerPoint en Word
Werken met SPSS voor projecttaken (pré, maar niet verplicht)




🎓 Wie Deze Rol Leuke Zal Vinden

Een student of pas afgestudeerde (Data, Marketing, Wiskunde, Business Analytics — allemaal welkom!)
Iemand die goed is met cijfers en analytisch werk leuk vindt
Opzoek naar sterke ervaring voor je CV / portfolio

Fulltime voor ongeveer 6 weken
Start: zo snel mogelijk

Title: Data Analyst / Data Visualization Expert (F/M/X)
Description:
Job Description

Amaris Consulting is looking for a Data Visualization & Analytics Specialist who is passionate about turning data into clear, actionable insights. In this role, you will analyze complex datasets, build impactful dashboards, and help stakeholders make data-driven decisions across the organization. This position is ideal for a data professional who combines strong analytical skills with a talent for storytelling and visual communication, and who enjoys working at the intersection of data, technology, and business. The role will support a key client of ours.

Key Responsibilities

As a Data Visualization & Analytics Specialist, your role may include:



Analyzing datasets to identify trends, correlations, and patterns
Designing and developing dashboards and reports using tools such as Power BI, Tableau, QlikSense, or QuickSight
Translating stakeholder requirements into actionable data insights
Communicating findings clearly to both technical and non-technical audiences
Ensuring data quality and integrity through continuous auditing and validation
Collaborating with cross-functional teams to embed data-driven insights into business strategies
Providing guidance on best practices in data visualization and data storytelling
Applying machine learning techniques to enhance predictive analytics and uncover deeper patterns in data
Staying up to date with emerging trends and techniques in analytics, machine learning, and visualization



Your Profile



Bachelor's or Master's degree in Data Science, Computer Science, Statistics, Mathematics, or a related field
3+ years of experience in data analysis and data visualization
Strong experience with data visualization tools (Power BI, Tableau, QlikSense, QuickSight, or similar)
Solid analytical skills with hands-on experience in SQL, Python, and/or R
Hands-on experience with machine learning — and a genuine enthusiasm for applying it to real-world data challenges
Experience with Java for data processing or system integration
Excellent communication skills with the ability to translate complex data into clear insights
Detail-oriented, structured, and quality-driven



Nice to have:



Experience in Dutch



Why Join Us?



Contribute to impactful and innovative engineering projects across the Netherlands.
Join an international consulting environment focused on growth, digital transformation, and continuous learning.
Collaborate with major global industry leaders across sectors such as technology, manufacturing, and life sciences.
Enjoy a hybrid work model with a blend of office and remote work.
Work within a diverse, international network supported by global hubs and centers of excellence.
Benefit from additional perks such as performance bonuses and mobility options.



Amaris Consulting is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace. We are committed to promoting diversity within the workforce and creating an inclusive working environment. For this reason, we welcome applications from all qualified candidates, regardless of gender, sexual orientation, race, ethnicity, beliefs, age, marital status, disability, or other characteristics

Who are we?

Amaris Consulting is an independent technology consulting firm providing guidance and solutions to businesses. With more than 1,000 clients across the globe, we have been rolling out solutions in major projects for over a decade – this is made possible by an international team of 7,600 people spread across 5 continents and more than 60 countries. Our solutions focus on four different Business Lines: Information System & Digital, Telecom, Life Sciences and Engineering. We’re focused on building and nurturing a top talent community where all our team members can achieve their full potential. Amaris is your steppingstone to cross rivers of change, meet challenges and achieve all your projects with success.

At Amaris, we strive to provide our candidates with the best possible recruitment experience. We like to get to know our candidates, challenge them, and be able to give them proper feedback as quickly as possible. Here's what our recruitment process looks like:

Brief Call: Our process typically begins with a brief virtual/phone conversation to get to know you! The objective? Learn about you, understand your motivations, and make sure we have the right job for you!

Interviews (the average number of interviews is 3 - the number may vary depending on the level of seniority required for the position). During the interviews, you will meet people from our team: your line manager of course, but also other people related to your future role. We will talk in depth about you, your experience, and skills, but also about the position and what will be expected of you. Of course, you will also get to know Amaris: our culture, our roots, our teams, and your career opportunities!

Case study: Depending on the position, we may ask you to take a test. This could be a role play, a technical assessment, a problem-solving scenario, etc.

As you know, every person is different and so is every role in a company. That is why we have to adapt accordingly, and the process may differ slightly at times. However, please know that we always put ourselves in the candidate's shoes to ensure they have the best possible experience.

We look forward to meeting you!

Title: Marketing Data & Insights Analyst
Description:
IN ART WE TRUST

Moco isn’t like any other museum. We started in Amsterdam, expanded to Barcelona, and after receiving +5 million visitors are now shaking things up in London. Our goal? To make art, fun, bold, and for everyone. At Moco, we showcase work by icons like Basquiat, Warhol, Kusama and street legends like Banksy, whose art challenges power and speaks to the people.

We celebrate the voices that are not always found in traditional museums, from the streets to the digital world and beyond. Our spaces are filled with immersive art, powerful messages and a playful spirit. We believe in breaking the rules, thinking differently, and making art that connects with real life. Our team is made up of curious, passionate people who love creativity, community, and doing things with heart. You don’t need to be an art expert, just open-minded, energetic, and ready to be part of something exciting.

THIS IS YOU

We are looking for a sharp, curious Marketing Data & Insights Analyst to join our performance marketing team in Amsterdam. You will be the person in the team who lives in the data every day — across paid media, creative, CRM, conversion, and the visitor experience — turning numbers into decisions.

Where the rest of the team is focused on running campaigns and channels, you focus on what the data is telling us across all of them, and make sure those insights actually change what we do next. You’ll work closely with the Head of Performance Marketing and the wider marketing team across Amsterdam, Barcelona and London, and will be the go-to person whenever someone asks “what does the data say?”

This role is ideal for someone with a genuine love of digging into numbers, spotting patterns, and translating them into clear, actionable recommendations — not just building reports, but driving the conversations that follow them.

Key Responsibilities

Performance Marketing Analysis


monitor performance across Meta, Google, TikTok and affiliate channels, identifying what’s working, what isn’t, and why.
track channel mix efficiency and spend allocation, surfacing where budget should shift.
build and maintain dashboards that give the team a daily, reliable view of performance across markets.


Creative Insights


analyse creative performance across formats, hooks and messaging to identify what drives results.
turn creative learnings into a living set of best practices for the content and design teams.


Conversion Rate Optimisation (CRO)


own the A/B testing roadmap for landing pages, the website and the ticketing funnel.
design, run and read out tests, working with the development team to implement winning variants.
identify friction points in the customer journey from ad click to completed booking.


Attribution & Channel Mix


track attribution trends across channels and flag shifts early (e.g. organic search decline, paid efficiency changes).
provide recommendations on how the channel mix should evolve based on performance and attribution data.


Visitor & Customer Insights


analyse visitor survey data (discovery channels, favourite artists, satisfaction) across locations.
identify trends and differences between Amsterdam, Barcelona and London, and translate them into recommendations.


Forecasting, Reporting & Tooling


support visitor and ticket sales forecasting, and benchmark performance across locations.
analyse promotion, discount code and partner channel performance.
maintain and improve the analytics stack (GA4, Meta Pixel, TikTok Pixel, Klaviyo, ticketing data) and own a single source of truth for reporting.


Requirements


2–5 years of experience in a marketing analytics, performance marketing, CRO or data analyst role.
strong hands-on experience with GA4, and comfortable working in Meta Business Suite, TikTok Ads Manager and similar platforms.
experience designing and running A/B tests; familiarity with CRO/testing tools is a plus.
strong Excel/Sheets skills; experience with a BI or dashboarding tool (e.g. Looker Studio) is a plus.
comfortable working with CRM data (Klaviyo or similar) and survey data.
an analytical mindset paired with strong communication skills — you can explain what the data means to non-analysts and influence decisions.
experience in e-commerce, ticketing or visitor attractions is a plus, but not required.
proactive and curious: you don’t wait to be asked the question, you spot it in the data first.


What Moco Offers

Beneath our brand’s surface, at Moco Museum we are a team that thrives on creativity, inclusivity and collaboration. Each of us brings unique ideas, experiences and perspectives that shape the way we work, adapt and grow.

Always building something new and forward-looking, giving you the chance to develop your career while being part of a Company that embraces change and celebrates fresh ideas. We approach challenges and successes together, with a mindset of continuous learning and innovation.

Beyond the work itself, we create space to connect and enjoy our time as colleagues, from Friday drinks to team-building activities, making Moco a workplace where our people feel involved and motivated. Here you will find more than just a job, you will find a place to belong.

In addition, we provide the following benefits:


competitive salary
a fun and supportive team culture
regular social events and parties
staff discounts on merchandise and entry
room to grow and develop professionally
a workplace that values originality and input


IN YOU WE TRUST

Are you looking for a career that is challenging, but more importantly, rewarding? Do you think you have the Moco DNA? Did the job description speak to you?

If you are nodding yes, then Moco Museum might just be the place for you. Please apply with your CV and/or a cover letter showing us why you would be a great fit for this role. Your place at Moco is waiting for you.

About Us

From the bustling Museumplein of Amsterdam to the charming Gothic Quarter of Barcelona, and now, steps away from Marble Arch in the heart of London - Moco Museum is the global hub of art lovers and the art curious. This is the proud home to modern classics by the likes of Jean-Michel Basquiat, Andy Warhol, Yayoi Kusama, KAWS, Marina Abramović, Keith Haring, Kehinde Wiley and Tracey Emin, as well as new immersive wonders by contemporary stars.

Across all areas of the museum, at Moco we work together to connect millions of viewers to carefully curated collections that inspire us all to defy expectations, follow our hearts and dream harder. Every day, our vision evolves and our reach grows. We trust in art as the vehicle to transport our collective consciousness into a more free, enlightened state. We are bold, pink, disruptive and playful – we are Moco.

You’ll work closely with the Head of Performance Marketing and the wider marketing team across Amsterdam, Barcelona and London, and will be the go-to person whenever someone asks “what does the data say?”

This role is ideal for someone with a genuine love of digging into numbers, spotting patterns, and translating them into clear, actionable recommendations — not just building reports, but driving the conversations that follow them.

Key Responsibilities

Performance Marketing Analysis

  • monitor performance across Meta, Google, TikTok and affiliate channels, identifying what’s working, what isn’t, and why.
  • track channel mix efficiency and spend allocation, surfacing where budget should shift.
  • build and maintain dashboards that give the team a daily, reliable view of performance across markets.

Creative Insights

  • analyse creative performance across formats, hooks and messaging to identify what drives results.
  • turn creative learnings into a living set of best practices for the content and design teams.

Conversion Rate Optimisation (CRO)

  • own the A/B testing roadmap for landing pages, the website and the ticketing funnel.
  • design, run and read out tests, working with the development team to implement winning variants.
  • identify friction points in the customer journey from ad click to completed booking.

Attribution & Channel Mix

  • track attribution trends across channels and flag shifts early (e.g. organic search decline, paid efficiency changes).
  • provide recommendations on how the channel mix should evolve based on performance and attribution data.

Visitor & Customer Insights

  • analyse visitor survey data (discovery channels, favourite artists, satisfaction) across locations.
  • identify trends and differences between Amsterdam, Barcelona and London, and translate them into recommendations.

Forecasting, Reporting & Tooling

  • support visitor and ticket sales forecasting, and benchmark performance across locations.
  • analyse promotion, discount code and partner channel performance.
  • maintain and improve the analytics stack (GA4, Meta Pixel, TikTok Pixel, Klaviyo, ticketing data) and own a single source of truth for reporting.

Requirements

  • 2–5 years of experience in a marketing analytics, performance marketing, CRO or data analyst role.
  • strong hands-on experience with GA4, and comfortable working in Meta Business Suite, TikTok Ads Manager and similar platforms.
  • experience designing and running A/B tests; familiarity with CRO/testing tools is a plus.
  • strong Excel/Sheets skills; experience with a BI or dashboarding tool (e.g. Looker Studio) is a plus.
  • comfortable working with CRM data (Klaviyo or similar) and survey data.
  • an analytical mindset paired with strong communication skills — you can explain what the data means to non-analysts and influence decisions.
  • experience in e-commerce, ticketing or visitor attractions is a plus, but not required.
  • proactive and curious: you don’t wait to be asked the question, you spot it in the data first.

What Moco Offers

Beneath our brand’s surface, at Moco Museum we are a team that thrives on creativity, inclusivity and collaboration. Each of us brings unique ideas, experiences and perspectives that shape the way we work, adapt and grow.

Always building something new and forward-looking, giving you the chance to develop your career while being part of a Company that embraces change and celebrates fresh ideas. We approach challenges and successes together, with a mindset of continuous learning and innovation.

Beyond the work itself, we create space to connect and enjoy our time as colleagues, from Friday drinks to team-building activities, making Moco a workplace where our people feel involved and motivated. Here you will find more than just a job, you will find a place to belong.

In addition, we provide the following benefits:

  • competitive salary
  • a fun and supportive team culture
  • regular social events and parties
  • staff discounts on merchandise and entry
  • room to grow and develop professionally
  • a workplace that values originality and input

IN YOU WE TRUST

Are you looking for a career that is challenging, but more importantly, rewarding? Do you think you have the Moco DNA? Did the job description speak to you?

If you are nodding yes, then Moco Museum might just be the place for you. Please apply with your CV and/or a cover letter showing us why you would be a great fit for this role. Your place at Moco is waiting for you.

About Us

From the bustling Museumplein of Amsterdam to the charming Gothic Quarter of Barcelona, and now, steps away from Marble Arch in the heart of London - Moco Museum is the global hub of art lovers and the art curious. This is the proud home to modern classics by the likes of Jean-Michel Basquiat, Andy Warhol, Yayoi Kusama, KAWS, Marina Abramović, Keith Haring, Kehinde Wiley and Tracey Emin, as well as new immersive wonders by contemporary stars.

Across all areas of the museum, at Moco we work together to connect millions of viewers to carefully curated collections that inspire us all to defy expectations, follow our hearts and dream harder. Every day, our vision evolves and our reach grows. We trust in art as the vehicle to transport our collective consciousness into a more free, enlightened state. We are bold, pink, disruptive and playful – we are Moco.

Title: Master Data Analyst (f/m/d)
Description:
Techtronic Industries (TTI) is a world leader in cordless technology spanning power tools, accessories, hand tools, outdoor power equipment, as well as floorcare & cleaning products. Our focus is on end-users that range from professionals in the industrial, construction and infrastructure sectors to DIYers in home improvement, repair, and maintenance. TTI’s powerful brand portfolio includes MILWAUKEE®, RYOBI®, AEG® - recognized worldwide for their deep heritage and innovative product platforms of superior quality.

The company maintains a global manufacturing and product development footprint, with record world-wide sales of approximately US$15.2 billion and around 50,000 employees in 2026. Hiring exceptional people is a top focus at TTI. This drives a high-performance culture across all levels of our organization and helps to achieve our vision of being number one in the industries we serve. Our unique high-speed decision-making process supports our acute focus on developing superior products and meeting high customer expectations. We view our winning culture as a competitive advantage that powers our growth.

As a Master Data Analyst (f/m/d), you will take an active role in creating, maintaining, and validating product master data, ensuring its quality, accuracy, and integrity across the business. You will analyse data, processes, and ownership to identify improvement opportunities, assess business impact, and implement effective solutions. Working closely with cross-functional teams across EMEA—including Supply Chain, Marketing, Product Management, IT, and Finance—you will contribute to continuous improvement and support business performance through reliable, high-quality data.

You will take ownership of data quality throughout the product lifecycle, ensuring a strong right-first-time approach and maintaining the integrity of master data processes.

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:


Own and manage product master data across SAP and the Product Information Management (PIM) system throughout the full product lifecycle.
Manage end-to-end product creation processes, coordinating with stakeholders (f-m-d) to ensure timely, accurate, and complete master data through validation, reconciliation, and issue resolution.
Execute and support both individual and mass data maintenance activities while ensuring compliance with data structures, dependencies, and system requirements.
Build and maintain reports using advanced Excel, Power Query, and Qlik.
Transforming and analysing data to support business decisions and operational transparency.
Identify data gaps, drive process improvements, and implement efficient solutions to enhance data quality, operational efficiency, and workflows.
Support the standardisation, governance, and documentation of data management processes.
Act as a key user (f/m/d), and point of contact for SAP and the Product Information Management (PIM) system.


YOUR PROFILE:


Extensive experience in product master data management within an ERP environment.
Relevant experience working with SAP (MM/SD).
Professional experience working with Product Information Management (PIM) systems.
Proven experience using Power Query for data transformation and preparation.
Experience with Business Intelligence platforms; Qlik Sense is desirable.
Good knowledge in Excel.
Willingness to travel according to business needs.


#TTI-EMEA

At TTI, we are committed to being an equal opportunity employer. We believe in creating a supportive environment where everyone can thrive and grow. If you're looking to join a forward-thinking company that values collaboration, innovation, and impact — we’d love to hear from you. Apply now and be part of something exciting!

Visit https://www.ttigroup.com to find out more about us

Title: Data Visualization Engineer & Data Integration Analyst
Description:
Job Number: R0242934

Data Visualization Engineer & Data Integration Analyst

The Opportunity:

As a data analyst, you love diving into data and turning it into meaningful insights. With the abundance of structured and unstructured data available across operational, assessment, and planning environments, you understand the importance of transforming complex data sets into useful information to solve mission challenges. As a data analyst at Booz Allen, you can use your skills and experience to support a national security mission and use data for good. We need a data expert like you to bring your expertise to help U.S. Special Operations leaders better understand trends, gaps, risks, and opportunities across partner nation programs and operational activities.

As a client-facing Data Visualization Engineer & Data Integration Analyst on our team, you’ll work closely with Special Operations customers, planners, analysts, and mission partners to understand their questions and needs, then dig into data-rich environments to find the pieces of their information puzzle. Not only will you provide a deeper understanding of their data, you’ll also advise the client on what the information means and how it can be used to improve planning, assessment, partner engagement, and senior leader decision-making.

How You’ll Contribute:

As a data analyst on our team, you’ll:


Use your data analytics expertise to support client and stakeholder relationships.
Research, develop, and test data methodologies, and generate cross-functional solutions through collection, cleaning, interpretation, evaluation, integration, and analysis of operational and assessment data.
Contribute to impactful work and guide decision-making across planners, assessment analysts, operational environment analysts, and senior stakeholders.
Apply communication skills and data analytics expertise by simplifying technical requirements, data trends, and analytical findings based on audience.
Present data findings and recommendations to clients and stakeholders using your knowledge of databases, scripting languages such as SQL, Python, or R, visualization tools, and Microsoft Office Suite.
Apply data visualization through formats such as dashboards, graphs, tables, trackers, maps, and PowerPoint slides.
Grow your communication and technical skills by creating data-centric solutions across special operations, campaign assessment, partner nation engagement, and operational planning missions.



Work with us to drive large-scale decisions through data insights.

Join us. The world can’t wait.

You Have:


5+ years of experience supporting data visualization, data analysis, data integration, business intelligence, dashboard development, or knowledge management
Experience collecting, cleaning, structuring, integrating, analyzing, or visualizing data from multiple sources
Experience developing dashboards, visual reports, data trackers, executive-level data products, or recurring reporting tools
Knowledge of data visualization principles, data quality, workflow automation, data management, information management, or knowledge management practices
Ability to communicate technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders and translate mission requirements into practical data solutions
Ability to work with planners, analysts, and operational stakeholders to define data requirements and translate complex information into clear visual products
Ability to develop repeatable templates, dashboards, trackers, data collection frameworks, or automated workflows that support recurring reporting and assessment cycles
TS/SCI clearance
HS diploma or GED



Nice If You Have:


Experience supporting a Theater Special Operations Command, Geographic Combatant Command, or other Department of Defense client
Experience with security cooperation, partner force development, irregular warfare, counterterrorism, special operations, exercises, or campaign assessment
Experience with Microsoft Power Platform, including Power BI, Power Automate, Power Apps, or SharePoint lists
Experience with SQL, Python, R, JavaScript, Databricks, application programming interfaces, or data transformation tools
Experience supporting Mission Command System – Common Operational Picture, Maven Smart System, Palantir, Advana, Tableau, ESRI, or other mission data platforms
Knowledge of Africa regional security dynamics, partner nation operational environments, transnational threat networks, or campaign planning processes
Bachelor's degree in Data Analytics, Information Systems, Computer Science, Engineering, Mathematics, Statistics, Operations Research, Business Analytics, National Security Studies, or a related field preferred; Master’s degree in Data Analytics, Information Systems, Computer Science, Engineering, Mathematics, Statistics, Operations Research, Business Analytics, National Security Studies, or a related field a plus



Clearance:

Applicants selected will be subject to a security investigation and may need to meet eligibility requirements for access to classified information; TS/SCI clearance is required.

Compensation

At Booz Allen, we celebrate your contributions, provide you with opportunities and choices, and support your total well-being. Our offerings include health, life, disability, financial, and retirement benefits, as well as paid leave, professional development, tuition assistance, work-life programs, and dependent care. Our recognition awards program acknowledges employees for exceptional performance and superior demonstration of our values. Full-time and part-time employees working at least 20 hours a week on a regular basis are eligible to participate in Booz Allen’s benefit programs. Individuals that do not meet the threshold are only eligible for select offerings, not inclusive of health benefits. We encourage you to learn more about our total benefits by visiting the Resource page on our Careers site and reviewing Our Employee Benefits page.

Salary at Booz Allen is determined by various factors, including but not limited to location, the individual’s particular combination of education, knowledge, skills, competencies, and experience, as well as contract-specific affordability and organizational requirements. The projected compensation range for this position is $77,500.00 to $176,000.00 (annualized USD). The estimate displayed represents the typical salary range for this position and is just one component of Booz Allen’s total compensation package for employees. This posting will close within 90 days from the Posting Date.

Identity Statement

As part of the hiring process, we will ask you to complete an identity verification process that leverages advanced biometrics and artificial intelligence to ensure authenticity and protect against identity fraud. You are expected to be on camera during interviews and assessments. We reserve the right to take your picture to verify your identity and prevent fraud.

Candidate AI Usage Policy

AI is a part of our daily work at Booz Allen, and we are committed to the responsible and ethical use of AI tools. However, we want to ensure a fair candidate process based on your own skills and knowledge. As part of this commitment, the use of artificial intelligence (AI) or other tools to assist with responses during interviews (whether in-person or virtual) is prohibited unless permission is explicitly provided.

Work Model

Our people-first culture prioritizes the benefits of collaboration, whether it occurs in person or virtually. To support engagement and effective communication, employees working virtually are generally expected to have their cameras on during meetings.


Remote: If this position is listed as remote, there may still be occasions when you are required to work in person at a Booz Allen or customer facility.
Hybrid: If this position is listed as hybrid, you will be expected to work from a Booz Allen facility frequently, in alignment with leadership expectations and the needs of the role. You may also be required to work from or visit a customer facility.
Onsite: If this position is listed as onsite, work will primarily be performed at a Booz Allen office or customer facility, where employees will collaborate directly with colleagues and customers as required by the role.



Commitment to Non-Discrimination

All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to disability, status as a protected veteran or any other status protected by applicable federal, state, local, or international law.

Advantest Europe GmbH

Data Analyst - Technical Quality & Customer Insights (m/f/d)

Böblingen

Kennziffer: 8679

Aufgabe

Provide interpreted analytical insights to support data-driven decision-making across technical divisions. Analyze complex technical production data against defined production KPIs, including validation of patterns, deviations, trends, and correlations.
